overview.short: Harishchandragad is a hill fort in the Ahilyanagar district of India.
overview.description: Harishchandragad is a hill fort in the Ahilyanagar district of India. Its history is linked with that of Malshej Ghat, Kothale village and it has played a role in guarding and controlling the surrounding region.

topPlaces.name: Pimpalgaon Joge Dam
topPlaces.description: Pimpalgaon Joge Dam, is an earthfill dam on Ar Pushpavati river, a tributary of Kukadi River near Junnar, Pune district in the state of Maharashtra in India.

topPlaces.name: Ghanchakkar
topPlaces.description: Ghanchakkar 1,532 metres (5,026 ft) is the third highest peak in the Maharashtra State under Sahyadri mountain ranges in western India. Its neighbouring peak Muda 1,520 metres (4,990 ft) is the fourth highest peak in the Maharashtra State under Sahyadris.

items.note: Pimpalgaon Joge Dam, is an earthfill dam on Ar Pushpavati river, a tributary of Kukadi River near Junnar, Pune district in the state of Maharashtra in India.

Ghanchakkar 1,532 metres (5,026 ft) is the third highest peak in the Maharashtra State under Sahyadri mountain ranges in western India. Its neighbouring peak Muda 1,520 metres (4,990 ft) is the fourth highest peak in the Maharashtra State under Sahyadris.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Harishchandragad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Harishchandragad is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (71 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (63 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Harishchandragad?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Harishchandragad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Harishchandragad?
faq.a: Stays in Harishchandragad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Harishchandragad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pimpalgaon Joge Dam, Ghanchakkar.
